extra.message: User input from query parameter 'username' is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string and rendered without any sanitization. This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI), enabling arbitrary code execution. An attacker can inject template expressions like '{{ 10 * 10 }}' or '{{ config }}' to execute arbitrary Python code on the server.

cwe: CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
CWE-95: Improper Neutralization of Directives in Dynamically Evaluated Code ('Eval Injection')
